title: Sr. Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)
score_reasoning: Your experience with Python, Go, Docker, AWS, and observability tools aligns well with Zora's core infrastructure needs, and the remote-first setup from Berlin is excellent. However, this role emphasizes Kubernetes (a critical gap for you), distributed storage systems like Ceph, and blockchain/crypto domain expertise—none of which appear in your CV. While your 7 years of backend experience and proven infrastructure work at Velox (migration frameworks, microservices, monitoring) demonstrate relevant systems thinking, the blockchain focus and specialized infrastructure tooling (RPC proxies, L2 architectures, Ethereum) represent a significant domain shift from your distributed services background. The seniority level is appropriate, but the growth trajectory leans into crypto/blockchain and specialized infrastructure rather than deepening your current backend-systems expertise.

red_flags: Kubernetes is explicitly required and a core responsibility; you have only basic Docker experience
Blockchain/crypto domain expertise (Ethereum, EVM chains, L2 solutions) is a major requirement with no evidence in your profile
Distributed storage systems (Ceph) experience is listed as required; not in your CV
Crypto/Web3 industry is acceptable in your preferences, but the role's infrastructure-to-blockchain focus is a notable pivot from backend-services work
SRE title suggests ownership of on-call and incident response at scale, which aligns with your experience, but blockchain-specific debugging (RPC nodes, IPFS) is outside your wheelhouse
